raw_title: Time in communication research and theories
title_en: Time in communication research and theories
title_zh: 传播研究与理论中的时间
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了时间在传播研究中的重要性，分析了时间如何影响传播过程和理论发展。
plain_summary_en: This article explores the importance of time in communication research, analyzing how time influences communication processes and theoretical development.
research_direction_zh: 传播学中的时间维度研究，关注时间因素对传播理论构建和实证研究的影响。
research_direction_en: Research on temporal dimensions in communication studies, focusing on how time factors influence communication theory construction and empirical research.
